CLICKHOUSE_URL.description: The URL of the ClickHouse server, including the protocol and port (e.g., http://localhost:8123)

CLICKHOUSE_USERNAME.description: The username for authenticating with the ClickHouse server

CLICKHOUSE_PASSWORD.description: The password for authenticating with the ClickHouse server

CLICKHOUSE_DATABASE.description: The name of the ClickHouse database to connect to
